data.body: Story 8d8e expand phase. Plan: repoint signing.sign_manifest to mint rebar.opcert.v1 DSSE op-cert with auto-gen Ed25519 .opcert-key; race-safe genesis via os.link; verify_attestation_record shape-aware wrapper; degrade raises SigningError naming OpenSSH>=8.9; guard close-gate sign; claim gate names OpenSSH; schema+types+model updates; reducer folds principal; gitignore.
